'''Morymento''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kerilt]]. It was a [[Caamasi Remnant]] community under [[Trustant]] [[Elegos A'Kla]], and included a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and a warehouse district. It received shipments of supplies semi-annually, making it a target for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] it was [[Battle of Algara|hit]] by both the [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian Slavers]] and the [[Invids]].

Later that year, the Remnant community was relocated to [[Susevfi]].

{{City-stub}}
